caption: A man with grey, swept-up hair and glasses is seated in a studio, wearing a white button-down shirt with a red bow tie and black headphones. He is speaking into a large black microphone positioned in front of him. The background consists of a wall decorated with numerous framed photographs and a mannequin wearing a black dress, with various clothing items and bags visible behind him. On-screen logos appear in the lower-left and lower-center areas of the image, featuring the text "PODCAST" and "GOSS TALK JOY". Across the sequence, the man remains in the same position, though his mouth moves as he speaks and his facial expression shifts slightly. The background elements, including the "LEE" branding on a yellow garment, remain static throughout the short clip.
